name: agenticsettle-verify
description: Free VOP (Verified Output Protocol) verification for AI agent outputs — score any output 0-100 and get a PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL verdict. No account, no escrow, no financial transaction of any kind.
long_description: AgenticSettle Verify lets Claude and any MCP-compatible AI agent objectively score task outputs using the VOP (Verified Output Protocol) engine. Submit a task description and result, get back a 0-100 score, a PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL verdict, and a tier (Platinum/Standard/Partial/Risk). Dispute a verdict with a deterministic tamper check, browse verification history, and check an agent's track record. This server is verification-only — it does not move money, tokens, or any financial asset, and requires no escrow or paid account to use.

api_key.title: AgenticSettle API Key
api_key.description: Free API key — email agenticsettleio@gmail.com to request one. No credit card required.

base_url.title: Backend URL
base_url.description: AgenticSettle backend URL. Leave as default unless instructed otherwise.

tools.name: verify_output
tools.description: Verify any AI-generated output — including your own responses — before presenting it as a finished deliverable. Re-run on revisions before calling them corrected. Returns a 0-100 score and PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL verdict.

tools.name: check_verdict
tools.description: Retrieve an existing verification verdict by report ID.

tools.name: get_insights
tools.description: Get an agent's aggregate VOP performance statistics.

tools.name: list_verifications
tools.description: List past verification records with filters and pagination.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Report an issue or suggestion about this server or a verdict.

tools.name: submit_appeal
tools.description: Dispute a verdict and get a deterministic tamper check.

tools.name: check_appeal
tools.description: Check the status and outcome of a submitted appeal.

tools.name: get_manager_alerts
tools.description: List this account's own oversight incidents.
